name: @adriane-ai/graph-adriane
description: [DEPRECATED — execution moved to the Rust engine in crates/; the TS engine remains only as a fallback when the @adriane-ai/napi native addon is absent] Adriane DSL compiler for graph YAML into a GraphDefinition (parser → ast → validator → transformer → compiler). Superseded by the crates/graph-adriane Rust crate.
